scripts.docker:run-tests: docker compose run --name pw-test playwright; docker cp pw-test:/repo/indeks-storybook/playwright-report playwright-report 2>/dev/null; docker cp pw-test:/repo/indeks-storybook/test-results test-results 2>/dev/null; docker rm pw-test
scripts.test:playwright: pnpm -w build && pnpm run build-storybook && pnpm run docker:run-tests; pnpm run docker:fix-ownership
scripts.docker:run-update-snapshots: docker compose run --name pw-update playwright --update-snapshots; docker cp pw-update:/repo/indeks-storybook/tests/scanAll.dtest.ts-snapshots tests/ 2>/dev/null; docker rm pw-update
scripts.update-snapshots: pnpm -w build && pnpm run build-storybook && pnpm run docker:clear-snapshots && pnpm run docker:run-update-snapshots; pnpm run docker:fix-snapshot-ownership
